name: RSS Top 3 AI News Summarizer -> AI Tools Directory

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { model: 'gpt-4o-mini', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an AI news analyst. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: summary and analysis. summary: 2-3 sentences, concise and factual. analysis: one short sentence about why this matters for AI users.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Title: ' + $json.title + '
URL: ' + ($json.url || $json.link) + '
Published: ' + ($json.published_at || '') + '
Source: ' + ($json.source_name || '') + '
Content: ' + ($json.contentSnippet || $json.content || '') } ] } }}

={{ { model: 'grok-2-image', prompt: 'Create a high-quality editorial blog thumbnail for this AI news story. Use no text, no logos, no watermarks. Title: ' + $json.title + '. Summary: ' + ($json.contentSnippet || $json.content || '').slice(0, 800) } }}
